subject: Sunday: Join us in Virginia

body:
Are you ready to kick things off? | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjI3NDM3MTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyOTEwOTc2S0&mt=1&rt=0) Friend --Ashburn is pumped -- and you should be, too! Folks in Virginia have been on a roll signing up volunteers and building support for Hillary, and there are no signs of it letting up.
We're ready to start organizing in Ashburn, but it won't be a real success unless we have our best supporters like you there.

So come and meet fellow volunteers of the Hillary for America team in Virginia, and have a great time while you do it.

**[Check out the details, then RSVP and mark your calendar for a great time organizing with other supporters:](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjI3NDM3MTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyOTEwOTc2S0&mt=1&rt=0)** **WHAT: **Grassroots Organizing Meeting**
WHEN:** Sunday, May 31st, 2015
2:00 p.m. - 3:30 p.m.**
WHERE:** 43316 Hay Road
Ashburn, Virginia 20147

**[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI3NDM3MTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyOTEwOTc2S0&mt=1&rt=0)**
Once you RSVP, spread the word! This is going to be a great time for new supporters, family, and friends -- so be sure to forward this email and bring the whole crew:

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/events/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI3NDM3MTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyOTEwOTc2S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Have fun,

Marlon

name: Ben Carson iPhone
subject: I've got to tell you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
|

Peter, I've got to tell you.

As a child growing up, not in a million years did I think I'd run for President. Today, one month after announcing I would run, I find myself tied for first place in the last two national polls. Our campaign based on "We The People" is catching fire all across this great country.

The Washington political class is starting to panic. It will not be long until they start attacking us.

Together, we are going to continue to surprise them.

As the first incredible month of my campaign comes to a close, I'd like to ask you for two favors that would really help us meet our goals.

[First, please make a donation of any amount, before Monday, to Carson America](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28096808:27000502806:m:1:876315805:5EA4D2F8A887BBC140B9F119CA13B3B2:r).

And second, encourage 3 people to sign up at [www.bencarson.com](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28096809:27000502806:m:1:876315805:5EA4D2F8A887BBC140B9F119CA13B3B2:r).

Thank you for being with me on this journey. I could not do it without you.

Your friend,

Ben

name: Rand Paul
subject: Fellow Conservative, this is serious
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Fellow Conservative:

My NSA spying showdown with President Obama is 24 hours away.

It may be the biggest blow ever taken against America's growing surveillance state.

My ten-and-a-half-hour filibuster against renewal of the so-called "PATRIOT Act's" worst spying provisions has thrown Washington, D.C. into turmoil.

As I write you, it's not clear the path NSA apologists will choose to take next. All that's clear is that, against all odds, you and I have won "Round 1."

But the stakes get even higher from here, and time is running out.

That's why I'm announcing an emergency 48 hour "NSA Spying Showdown" Money Bomb.

I've been called out by the Obama administration as Enemy #1 and with the Senate set for a special session on Sunday I only have until tomorrow to rally patriots to stand with me against President Obama's illegal NSA spying.

Fellow Conservative, Americans from all over the country are rising up to "Stand With Rand" and join the fight to restore our Bill of Rights.

**[Can I count on you to join me before the deadline](https://secure.randpaul.com/?patriotact&sr=rhf053015c)**?

I believe the grassroots army willing to "take our country back," as I envisioned in my announcement speech, is forming before our eyes. Polls are proving it.

But I know you have the ability to make a big impact with your generosity.

So today, with the Senate down to just eight hours on May 31st to RAM an extension into law, I'm writing to ask for your support for my emergency "NSA Spying Showdown" Money Bomb.

The truth is, you and I weren't supposed to be here.

With Section 215 of the so-called "PATRIOT Act" set to expire on May 31st - the section of federal law some wrongly say authorizes NSA spying - those who back the NSA's unconstitutional bulk collection of Americans' metadata wanted the Senate to roll over, reauthorize and extend the scheme.

It's no accident that the Senate was set to consider the so-called "PATRIOT Act" right before the Memorial Day holiday weekend.

Most Americans wouldn't be paying attention, and Senators would be anxious to get out of town for the planned week-long recess.

Even after the FBI admitted the NSA's programs helped them crack exactly zero terrorist plots, backers of the NSA's spying schemes continued to claim reauthorization of the so-called "PATRIOT Act" is a matter of grave national importance.

And despite the recent 2nd U.S. Circuit Court of Appeals' decision that the NSA's spying program was illegal, my colleagues wanted virtually zero debate or amendments.

Only in Washington, D.C. do illegal government schemes involving matters of "grave importance" deserve so little consideration!

Of course, this is all business-as-usual in Washington, D.C.

The flippant attitude toward our Bill of Rights.

The attempted last-minute railroading of legislation my colleagues know the American people oppose.

The Washington Machine trying to figure out how to sweep government agencies' lawlessness under the rug.

The reason I decided to run for President was to stop all of this madness. I've even pledged to end NSA spying on day one in the Oval Office.

So I decided I simply must take a stand.

On Wednesday, May 20th, around 1:15 in the afternoon, I took to the U.S. Senate's floor stating: "There comes to a time in the history of nations when fear and complacency allow power to accumulate and Liberty and privacy to suffer.

That time is now.

And I will not let the PATRIOT Act, the most un-Patriotic of acts, go unchallenged."

**[So I hope you will join me in fighting to stop illegal domestic spying by chipping in a contribution of $20.16 right away](https://secure.randpaul.com/?patriotact&sr=rhf053015c)**.

Fellow Conservative, my intention from the very beginning was to hold the floor as long as I could.

One lesson I learned from my 2013 filibuster to force the Obama administration to admit it had no authority to drone American citizens on American soil was to wear more comfortable shoes!

But I found out that shoes only do so much good.

Senators who are holding the floor can't go to the bathroom or even sit down during a filibuster. So even with an aching throat from so much speaking.

I had to be extremely careful not to drink too much water.

Thankfully, ten of my Senate colleagues came to the floor to spell me with questions.

As the hours pressed on, I became even more tired and sore - ultimately resorting to propping myself up with my desk to try and stop the throbbing pain in my back, feet and legs.

At 11:49 PM, I walked off of the floor. I was utterly exhausted - but excited at the same time.

I knew the NSA spying provisions my colleagues hoped to ram through the Senate and extend for years on end with little public fanfare had suddenly been thrust to the forefront of the American political debate - right where I wanted it.

My staff and I spent Thursday crafting a series of amendments to the "PATRIOT Act" to end all bulk collection of American's phone data and remove immunity from third party data holders who share Americans' private information with government agencies.

And as Friday evening turned into Saturday morning, the U.S. Senate went to work on the so-called "PATRIOT Act."

But around 12:40 AM, the U.S. Senate voted down the USA Freedom Act - the House's misguided "reform" bill, which still provides for bulk collection of Americans' records and warrantless searches.

And every attempt to extend Section 215 of the so-called "PATRIOT Act" \- from two months to two days - was defeated.

Before my filibuster, extension of the so-called "PATRIOT Act" was supposed to be a foregone conclusion. But now Politico says the "PATRIOT Act" is on "life support."

News reports claim the NSA is already taking steps to begin winding down their phone data collection programs.

When the Senate comes back into session on May 31st, there will be just eight hours for spy state apologists to reach a deal to keep these programs going. Eight hours!

I'm determined to do whatever I can to stop them - regardless of the ugly smears I face by both the press and surveillance state backers. Already, those attacks are coming hotter than ever.

In fact, the establishment's pick for President, who has called the NSA's illegal spying programs "the best part of the Obama administration," attacked me.

The senior Senator from Arizona even dared suggest my efforts were a campaign stunt!

They don't get it. They don't get the fact the American people are fed up and angry with politics-as-usual on everything from ObamaCare to spending to spying.

In Washington, D.C., freedom is sometimes viewed as a dirty word. But outside the Beltway, the American people still care about the Bill of Rights.

I care too. Immensely. After all, what's to become of our great nation if we simply throw up our hands, admit defeat and decide freedom no longer works?

Freedom does work. And the American people can have both their Liberty and security.

**[If you agree, I hope you'll chip in a contribution of $20.16 to my campaign today](https://secure.randpaul.com/?patriotact&sr=rhf053015c)**.

Defeating the Washington Machine and restoring the Founders' vision for our country is the core message of my presidential campaign. Ending NSA spying is an integral part.

This message is resonating among Americans of all backgrounds.

In fact, recent polls have me defeating Hillary Clinton in key swing states like Colorado, Iowa, New Hampshire, and Pennsylvania. One member of the media even called me "Hillary Clinton's Kryptonite!"

The fight to stop NSA data collection is not over. But I've proven that one man who is willing to take a stand and fight for the American people can make a difference.

Fellow Conservative, I'm going to continue to stand and fight. When the Senate goes back into session on May 31st, there will be only eight hours left.

It would mean the world to me to have your emergency support today.

I know you can make a big impact with your generosity. **[So please act right away](https://secure.randpaul.com/?patriotact&sr=rhf053015c)**.

| ****[** dpwillis67@gmail.com **](https://secure.randpaul.com/?patriotact&sr=rhf053015c "https://secure.randpaul.com/?patriotact&sr=rhf053015c")

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

Your support today would mean the world to me. **[Please chip in a contribution of $20.16](https://secure.randpaul.com/?patriotact&sr=rhf053015c)**.

I believe we can have both Liberty and security in America - if Patriots like you will join me in fighting back.

name: Rand Paul
subject: I'm forcing the PATRIOT Act to expire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

Tomorrow I will force the expiration of the NSA's illegal spying program.

I will not allow any bill extending illegal NSA spying to be rushed through ahead of the deadline.

My oath is to support and defend the Constitution and I won't back down.

The abuse of general warrants and the attack on the Bill of Rights must stop once-and-for-all.

We don't have to choose between fighting terrorism and obeying the Constitution.

That's why, two years ago, I sued the NSA.

It's why I proposed the Fourth Amendment Protection Act to force our government to abide by the Bill of Rights.

It's why I have fought for a full, open and honest debate on warrantless domestic spying -- a debate that is always kicked down the road in the name of "security."

So last week, with the proponents of this illegal spying rushing toward a deadline to ram through renewing illegal spying, I took a stand.

I filibustered for over 10 hours to shine a light on the vast expansion of the spy state and the erosion of our liberties.

I stood on the Senate floor until the early hours of the morning and helped block any short-term extension of these powers.

Tomorrow, the Senate will come back from recess with just hours left before the NSA's illegal spying powers expire.

And I won't allow defenders of the spy state to legislate through a manufactured crisis by holding a deadline over the head of Congress.

Let me be clear: I believe the number one job of the federal government is national defense.

I believe we must fight terrorism and I believe we must stand strong against our enemies.

But we do not need to compromise the Constitution in the process.

In fact, we must not.

I am ready and willing to start the debate on how we fight terrorism without giving up our liberty.

This can't be delayed any longer.

I do not do this to obstruct.

I'm fighting for a strong national defense that upholds the Constitution and protects Americans from enemies who seek to do us harm.

**[So I hope I can count on you to sign your petition and stand with me as I force illegal NSA spying to expire and stand strong against any deals or threats](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28101194:27004037559:m:1:879035888:EB072D765606F6CA521A407512180933:r)**.

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28101195:27004037559:m:1:879035888:EB072D765606F6CA521A407512180933:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28101196:27004037559:m:1:879035888:EB072D765606F6CA521A407512180933:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28101197:27004037559:m:1:879035888:EB072D765606F6CA521A407512180933:r) Paid for by Rand Paul for President

But we do not need to compromise the Constitution in the process. In fact, we must not. I am ready and willing to start the debate on how we fight terrorism without giving up our liberty. This can't be delayed any longer. I do not do this to obstruct. I'm fighting for a strong national defense that upholds the Constitution and protects Americans from enemies who seek to do us harm. . name: Jeff Roe, Cruz for President
subject: The latest from the Cruz for President Campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT www
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the following address: http://act.tedcruz.org/index.php/email/emailWebview?mkt_tok=3RkMMJWWfF9wsRonvqnIZKXonjHpfsX76%2B0sWKewlMI%2F0ER3fOvrPUfGjI4ARcZgI%2BSLDwEYGJlv6SgFSLHEMaFt3LgJWBg%3D

Hello Friend,

This past week we saw an outbreak of severe weather and flooding across Texas that resulted in widespread devastation across much of the Lone Star State. As a result, Ted spent a great deal of time meeting with state and local officials and touring the areas hardest hit by the weather.

Although it was heartbreaking to see lives lost, loved ones missing, and damage done to many families' homes, Ted was encouraged to see Texans and Americans rising to the challenge to help those in need. All of our thoughts and prayers continue to be with those who are recovering from this week's weather outbreak.

In addition to dealing with recovery efforts across Texas, Ted attended the Memorial Day Ceremony at Houston National Cemetery to honor <http://www.khou.com/story/news/local/2015/05/25/houston-remembers-war-dead-on-memorial-day/27930579/> those who paid the ultimate price defending our freedoms.

This week the campaign also continued to build out a robust national organization, announcing that Robert Uithoven will serve as our Nevada State Director <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/sen-cruz-names-robert-uithoven-nevada-state-director/>. With Robert’s stewardship, we look forward to competing and winning in Nevada – both for the nomination and the general election.

And on Thursday evening, Ted attended the Champions of Jewish Values International Awards Gala where he was given the group’s “Defender of Israel” award and offered a clear vision for what our nation’s next president must address to strengthen America’s alliance with the nation of Israel. It was reported <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/icymi-sen-cruz-captures-hearts-at-new-york-gala/> that Ted “capture[d] conservative Jewish hearts at [the] NY gala” and that it was he "who stole the show, by far.”

As always, we thank you for your continued support for our campaign, and we hope you'll continue reaching out to your family and friends to urge them to join us <https://www.tedcruz.org/volunteer/> as we fight together to reignite the promise of America!

All the best,

Jeff Roe
Campaign Manager

Samantha

Chris is running for Senate because he believes that Maryland can be an even better place for all of its citizens, where hard work pays off for all our families. Together, we can ensure that everyone has access to a high-quality education and good paying jobs.

But we can't do it without your help. Why is tomorrow's deadline goal so important?

Because hitting this grassroots goal means we'll be ready for any attack that comes our way. This summer is when big-money groups backed by the Koch brothers and their allies start making their decisions about who they're going to target in 2016. If we're not ready, we'll be vulnerable to their attacks - and that's why Chris needs you ahead of tomorrow's deadline.

**[Contribute now to help us fully fund our Grassroots Action Fund!](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e5d/70cdc2ba/47830767/3946277/902392781/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-05eom?refcode=em053015_2&amount=25.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=9+-+Contribute+now+to+help+us+fully+fund+our&utm_campaign=em053015_2&source=em053015_2")**

Sheila
Chris Van Hollen for Senate
